description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two compact, rounded speakers with a matte black exterior. The front face of each speaker features a circular, recessed area with a metallic ring and a central yellowish cone, suggesting a high-fidelity driver design. One speaker displays a small, round button or indicator light, while the other has the 'CREATIVE' brand logo in gold lettering. The rear and side views reveal a smooth, seamless shell with no visible ports or connectors. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on clean lines and subtle curves. These speakers are likely intended for desktop or small room use, providing both aesthetic appeal and functional audio output.
description: A pair of compact, rounded black stereo speakers with metallic accents and a modern, minimalistic design. The front features a gold logo, a yellowish driver cone, and a small button or indicator.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the smooth, rounded tops of both speakers with no visible features.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the seamless, matte black shell and the speakers' curved backs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the metallic rings, yellowish cones, 'CREATIVE' logo, and a small button or indicator on one speaker.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the smooth, unbroken surface of the speaker backs.
attribute_brand_logo: Gold 'CREATIVE' logo on the front face of the left speaker, in uppercase letters.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Smooth, circular recessed area with a metallic ring and central yellowish cone; no visible mesh or perforated grille.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single small round button or indicator on the front of the right speaker; no other controls visible.
